title: Gate root DAO origins by explicit admission
description: Add bounded explicit admission of currently pinned Announce identities before a new DAO origin can consume durable high-water capacity. Existing persisted high-water origins remain admitted on open; no silent eviction or destructive retirement API.
acceptance_criteria: 256 unadmitted churn identities consume no durable slots; admitted pinned identity applies; persisted high-water admission survives reopen; typed rejection/error exists; capacity fails closed.
